package rulecoverage

func NegativeServiceMethodAcceptsGinContext() string {
    ruleID := "service_method_accepts_gin_context"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Service methods that take `*gin.Context` instead of domain inputs plus `context.Context`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
